items: Atomic design pattern for component organization
Repository pattern for data access layer
Server Components for data fetching and security
Dynamic routes with generateStaticParams for SEO
Polymorphic URL policy for content systems
Guard architecture to prevent hydration mismatches
Component library extraction and Storybook setup
URL policy polymorphism for multi-system support
Test coverage: 94% overall, 100% for critical paths
Performance: All Core Web Vitals targets met
Bundle size: Optimized with code splitting
